examples:

!ip ip=93.174.93.63 detailed=true
Context Example
{
"DBotScore": {
"Indicator": "93.174.93.63",
"Score": 3,
"Type": "ip",
name: ip

outputs.description: The indicator that was tested DBotScore.Type Indicator type
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: For malicious IP addresses, the vendor that made the decision IP.Malicious.Description For malicious IP addresses, the reason that the vendor made the decision
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: IP address IP.RecordedFuture.Criticality Risk criticality label
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: date Risk first seen timestamp IP.RecordedFuture.LastSeen
outputs.name: IP.RecordedFuture.FirstSeen

outputs.description: Risk last seen timestamp IP.Tags Tags that are associated with the IP.
outputs.name: date

outputs.description: A summary note on the mentioning of the IP in a source monitored by Recorded Future. IP.CommunityNotes.timestamp date
outputs.name: IP.CommunityNotes.note
The timestamp in which the community note was created.

outputs.description: The title of the published information. IP.Publications.link A link to the published information.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: date The timestamp in which the information was published.
